film.title: Kunwara
film.overview: Raju meets Urmila in New Zealand. They have a fast romance and things are going well until Raju must make a trip back to India...

dialogues.dialogue: - Do you know him? I think so...Take me to him! I won't spare him! But what did he do? Something unforgivable! I am too ashamed to repeat it again! You are ashamed to tell. Won't you be ashamed when you hit him? He will then surely admit!

I won't spare him! But what did he do? Something unforgivable! I am too ashamed to repeat it again! You are ashamed to tell. Won't you be ashamed when you hit him? He will then surely admit! I even reserved a bed in hospital for him already
We will be killed because of you! Hide! Lay still! What happened? Nothing. Shameless body! You eat dinner. Listen.. Yes? I heared that there are ghosts and spooks that come out in the dark.

Me? Explain to him? You want me to be beaten up? Are you afraid for your son? No, but I am for his gun! Very shameful! He is your son. Will he shoot you when you tell him the truth? I know he is my son.
Yes, love, it is true. He came here to help her. Have some shame. I'm standing here! I am holding you after such a long time! Don't you feel any shame?

Have some shame. I'm standing here! I am holding you after such a long time! Don't you feel any shame? The task of the homing pigeon is just to deliver the letter and then leave. Am I just the mailman? Then I will take the letter back.
Am I just the mailman? Then I will take the letter back. Don't! I will turn away. Shameless! Finished? Not yet. The girl has grown up.

This is the thruth about him! His life started in an orphanage and will end in a canteen! You should proudly tell about the history of your 400 year old clan! Your father built a university, your grandfather a hospital. Our ancestors were land owners. They built 5 canals and 2 water wells.
He's the life of all pretty girls. Everybody loves him. He is the pride of all beauty. Let me put a blush on your cheeks. Let me lift those curls of yours.

You will have to apologize,  for the behaviour of this young man. Shut up! If you try to offend me, I am your worst enemy! You are very proud of your winning horses? I will teach you a lesson! I will win the race this year and give back the horse to uncle. Bravo, son!

Bravo, my son! Come, give me a hug! The wonder of all wonders! You made Thakur Balraj Singh  very proud! And I don't mind admitting my mistakes in public. I never accepted that Sharmila married you .....I never accepted you as my son-in-law. But I was wrong.
